name: But I Will Never Doubt a Woman's Tears!!!!

issues.description: Target should include Leader cards: scope should be 'ChooseOwnLeaderOrCharacter' not 'ChooseOwnCharacter'

SearchDeck action is incorrect. Card text says 'reveal 1 card from top of deck, play up to 1 Character with cost 2' — this is RevealFromHand/deck reveal mechanic followed by PlayFromHand conditional, not a SearchDeck
Second trigger 'Trigger' is invalid. The reveal-and-play sequence should be part of the OnPlay effect, not a separate trigger. The placement at top/bottom of deck is missing entirely
Filter uses 'maxPower' but should use cost-based filtering: 'maxCost':2 for Characters
